news.t: SPX Flow Confirms Rejecting Ingersoll’s Bid; Shares Soar 22%
SPX Flow To Snap Up Philadelphia Mixing Solutions For $65M

holdings.infoBox: FLOW is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are QUALCOMM stock at 3.02%, Delta Air Lines at 2.40%, Ford Motor Company at 2.29%, Archer-Daniels-Midland Company at 2.16%, and HP Inc. at 2.16%.

overview.description: The Global X U.S. Cash Flow Kings 100 ETF (FLOW) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Global X U.S. Cash Flow Kings 100 index. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-capitalization US companies that are perceived to have high profitability metrics based on free cash flow yield. FLOW was launched on Jul 10, 2023 and is issued by Global X.
infoTable: Global X U.S. Cash Flow Kings 100 Index

data.title: SPX Flow Confirms Rejecting Ingersoll’s Bid; Shares Soar 22%
data.text: Process solutions provider SPX Flow, Inc. (FLOW) confirmed yesterday that it had rejected Ingersoll Rand, Inc.’s (IR) all-cash buyout bid of $85 per share. Shares of FLOW soared 22.3% to…

data.title: SPX Flow To Snap Up Philadelphia Mixing Solutions For $65M
data.text: SPX Flow (FLOW) has agreed to buy Philadelphia Mixing Solutions. The process solutions company is to pay $65 million for the mixing solutions provider. The transaction should close in the…
